articles.author: Anthony Ha
articles.title: ‘Project Hail Mary’ becomes Amazon MGM’s biggest box office hit - TechCrunch
articles.description: Amazon’s bet on “Project Hail Mary” has paid off handsomely.
articles.content:
Amazons bet on Project Hail Mary has paid off handsomely, with the film recently surpassing Creed III to become the companys highest grossing movie ever.
And it was a big bet, with a reported budget… [+1970 chars]
